title.en: Noshir — Independent Publishing House in Tashkent, Uzbekistan

description.en: An independent Tashkent publisher launching an international translation programme to bring world literature into Uzbek. Registered 1995. Inaugural title: Pachinko by Min Jin Lee.
description.uz: Jahon adabiyotini o'zbek tiliga olib kelish uchun xalqaro tarjima dasturini ishga tushirayotgan mustaqil Toshkent nashriyoti. 1995 yilda tashkil etilgan. Birinchi nashr: Min Jin Leening "Pachinko" asari.

subheadline.en: We publish the finest fiction alongside modern IT and popular-science books to the highest standards. If you hold the rights to a work and have a ready project, we can turn it into a real book and bring it to readers.
subheadline.uz: Biz eng sara badiiy asarlar, shuningdek, zamonaviy IT va ilmiy-ommabop kitoblarni sifatli nashr etamiz. Agar sizda asarni chop etish huquqi va tayyor loyiha bo'lsa, biz uni haqiqiy kitobga aylantirish va o'quvchilarga taqdim etishda yordam beramiz.

heading.en: A Tashkent publishing house, turning to the world
heading.uz: Toshkentdagi nashriyot uyi — endi jahon sari

paragraph_1.en: Noshir LLC is an independent publishing house based in Tashkent. Since 1995, we have been dedicated to providing our readers with high-quality, beautifully printed books. Starting in 2026, we are embarking on an exciting new mission: helping bring the world's best contemporary fiction, non-fiction, and IT literature to Uzbek readers.
paragraph_1.uz: Noshir MChJ — Toshkentda joylashgan mustaqil nashriyot uyi. 1995 yildan buyon biz o'quvchilarimizga yuqori sifatli, chiroyli bosma kitoblar taqdim etishga bag'ishlanganmiz. 2026 yildan boshlab biz yangi va qiziqarli vazifaga kirishmoqdamiz: jahonning eng yaxshi zamonaviy badiiy, ilmiy-ommabop va IT adabiyotini o'zbek o'quvchilariga yetkazish.

s1_label.en: In the Uzbek publishing market since
s1_label.uz: O'zbek kitob bozorida shu yildan beri

subheading.en: Explore our collection of published books across literature, science, IT, and the humanities.
subheading.uz: Adabiyot, fan, IT va gumanitar sohalar bo'yicha nashr etilgan kitoblarimiz bilan tanishing.

heading.en: Seeking Uzbek-language rights for outstanding works
heading.uz: Eng zo'r asarlar uchun o'zbek tilidagi huquqlarni izlaymiz

intro.en: Noshir is actively acquiring Uzbek-language translation rights for contemporary fiction, literary classics, and essential non-fiction in business, technology, and ideas. We offer:
intro.uz: Noshir zamonaviy badiiy adabiyot, klassik asarlar, biznes, texnologiya va g'oyalar sohasidagi muhim ilmiy-ommabop asarlar uchun o'zbek tilidagi tarjima huquqlarini faol ravishda olmoqda. Biz quyidagilarni taklif etamiz:

offer_1.en: Direct contracts with international publishers and literary agencies
offer_1.uz: Xalqaro noshirlar va adabiy agentliklar bilan to'g'ridan-to'g'ri shartnomalar

offer_3.en: Hardcover and paperback editions for the Central Asian market
offer_3.uz: Markaziy Osiyo bozori uchun qattiq va yumshoq muqovali nashrlar

offer_4.en: Distribution through Uzbekistan's leading retail networks, including Asaxiy Books
offer_4.uz: Asaxiy Books kabi O'zbekistonning yetakchi savdo tarmoqlari orqali tarqatish

offer_5.en: Flat-fee or royalty-based licensing, depending on the work
offer_5.uz: Asarga qarab qat'iy to'lov yoki royalti asosidagi litsenziya

cta_text.en: Write to our rights representative. We respond to every serious inquiry within two business days.
cta_text.uz: Huquqlar vakilimizga yozing. Biz har bir jiddiy so'rovga ikki ish kuni ichida javob beramiz.

subheading.en: For rights inquiries, partnerships, or general correspondence.
subheading.uz: Huquq so'rovlari, hamkorlik yoki umumiy yozishmalar uchun.

address_value.en: 30 Navoiy Street, Shaykhontohur District, Tashkent 100000, Uzbekistan
address_value.uz: Navoiy ko'chasi, 30-uy, Shayxontohur tumani, Toshkent 100000, O'zbekiston

tagline.en: An independent publishing house in Tashkent, established 1995 — now launching an international translation programme for the Uzbek-language market.
tagline.uz: Toshkentdagi mustaqil nashriyot uyi, 1995 yilda tashkil etilgan — hozirda o'zbek tilidagi bozor uchun xalqaro tarjima dasturini ishga tushirmoqda.

legal.en: "Noshir" LLC · Registered in Tashkent, Republic of Uzbekistan
legal.uz: "Noshir" MChJ · Toshkent, O'zbekiston Respublikasida ro'yxatdan o'tgan
